name: Rosewood Hong Kong
senseOfPlace: The soaring city estate — harbour view, cultural centerpiece. Asaya wellness, Henry's, Chaat. Tailored elegance and verticality.

amenityOptions.name: Mooncake — single, hand-painted
amenityOptions.story: Hong Kong's mooncake tradition — Kee Wah has made them since 1938

amenityOptions.name: Tea flight — three estates
amenityOptions.story: Curated by Lock Cha — Hong Kong's most respected tea master

amenityOptions.name: Egg tarts, still warm
amenityOptions.story: Chris Patten's favourite — a Hong Kong civic memory in pastry form

signatureExperiences.title: Sunrise Tai Chi on the harbour terrace
signatureExperiences.whyHere: Victoria Harbour view; Asaya signature ritual

signatureExperiences.title: Private gallery walk — M+ Museum
signatureExperiences.whyHere: Adjacent to property; Asian contemporary art at scale

placemakers.name: Selena Lai
placemakers.bio: Third-generation Lock Cha master; private tastings for Rosewood guests.

_t2_notes: Expand with more amenities and a Phuket counterpart if scope allows.
